content.en:
As time went by, there were more and more good things, but there was still no high-level Chonggong Jindan secret recipe, which made Ye Tian a little anxious.

"Could it be that there is no high-level Chonggong Jindan secret recipe auctioned at this Wuge auction?" Ye Tian thought to himself.

But soon, his worries dissipated.

"The next auction item is the secret recipe of the high-level Chonggong Jindan - Tianhai Jindan. Tianhai Jindan is a high-level Chonggong Jindan that can greatly improve mana, and there is no need to worry about the copyright of this secret recipe. Once it is auctioned, it can be used to refine or even sell, and no force will come to cause trouble!"

"The high-level Chonggong Jindan secret recipe, the starting price is 5 million top-grade secret crystals!"

Bai Yi introduced.

"Tianhai Jindan!"

Many forces are interested in this high-level Chonggong Jindan secret recipe and have participated in the auction.

Soon, the bidding price soared to eight million, and it continued to soar until it reached 10 million top-grade secret crystals, and then the number of bidders decreased.

Ye Tian also participated in the bidding. No matter how much the other party offered, he would bid 27 more. 27

In short, he could not give up the secret recipe of Tianhai Jindan.

Unknowingly, the secret recipe of Tianhai Jindan had reached a terrifying high price of 13 million top-grade secret crystals. Many forces shook their heads and gave up the bidding.

However, there was still a force that seemed determined to win and continued to compete with Ye Tian.

"15 million top-grade secret crystals!"

Ye Tian continued to bid, but this price still did not scare the other party, and the other party directly bid 15.5 million top-grade secret crystals.

Until Ye Tian quoted a high price of 17 million top-grade secret crystals, the other party was completely scared and gave up the bidding.

In this way, he won the secret recipe of Tianhai Jindan at a high price of 17 million top-grade secret crystals.

He did not participate in the bidding for the good things afterwards. This time he had attracted enough attention and there was no need to continue to participate in the bidding for some treasures.

Besides, with his growth rate, those treasures would soon be useless to him. Why would he bid?

Gradually, the auction came to an end.

When a finale item that helped to comprehend the ultimate Chonggong rules was auctioned, the auction was completely over.

Ye Tian went to the backstage, paid the fee, took the secret recipe of Tianhai Jindan, and then walked out of the auction venue.

……

Outside Taikoo Leidu.

As soon as Ye Tian came out, he was surrounded by many practitioners. They all hid their identities, but their auras were very powerful, and they all surpassed the cultivation level above the 30th Heaven.

"Hand over the Tianhai Golden Pill secret recipe!"

A cultivator of the 34th Heaven ordered.

"Get out of here!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"You're looking for death!" The cultivator of the 34th Heaven gave him a look, and the others surrounded and killed him. These people were from the 31st to the 33rd Heaven, and their cultivation was higher than Ye Tian.

But when Ye Tian's breath exploded, the Extreme Blood Armor protected him, and he slashed out the Extreme Blood Blade. The terrifying blood-red light cut through the bodies of these practitioners, killing them one by one.

"Not good!"

The practitioner of the 34th Heaven was shocked. He wanted to rescue others but it was too late. He could only watch them being killed.

"You are looking for death!"

He angrily rushed to Ye Tian and fought with Ye Tian.

Dangdangdang! ! ! !

In an instant, they collided countless times, but soon they could not withstand Ye Tian's attack. The armor on their bodies was torn and their bodies were pierced. They had no choice but to flee.

Ye Tian could defeat a practitioner of the 34th Heaven, but it was difficult to kill him.

He waved his hand casually, took away the resources from the fallen, and then left quickly.

Very soon.

Others came here and looked at the traces of battle here, and sighed: "Which force did the cultivator who bid for the Tianhai Jindan secret recipe come from? With the cultivation of the 30th heaven, he instantly killed the cultivator of the 33rd heaven. His Chonggong should be the ultimate Chonggong! And he also created the ultimate Chonggong secret method, otherwise it would be impossible to be so evil!"

"Forget it, this person's identity is not simple, it is better not to offend him!"

"Fortunately I didn't have any ideas, otherwise I would have been killed if I attacked him just now!"

"But such a person has a high status and should come from a very powerful force. Why did he bid for the Tianhai Jindan secret recipe?"

"It is also possible that he is a defector from a certain force, or he has obtained the inheritance of a strong man. He lacks high-level Chonggong Jindan, which does not necessarily mean he is from a top force!"

"Forget it, no matter what his identity is, we can't offend him!"

Soon, these strong men dispersed.

……

Baiyue Ancient City

Ye Tian is back.

"The Tianhai Golden Pill secret recipe is in hand. Next, we only need to collect the resources recorded in the Tianhai Golden Pill secret recipe to start refining the Tianhai Golden Pill!"

Ye Tian took a look and found that many of the resources recorded on it were very rare. If the Wanjiao Society were asked to collect them, they might not be able to collect them.

At this time, he thought of Gui Lao.

So, he came to Gui Lao's residence again.

"Gui Lao!"

Ye Tian came to Gui Lao, which surprised him.

"Senior, you are here again!"

Gui Lao said in fear.

"Gui Lao, I want to find you to collect some resources!"

Ye Tian made a list of the resources he lacked and handed it to Gui Lao. 850

"This is..."

Gui Lao guessed what Ye Tian was going to do, which should be to refine the high-level Chonggong Jindan. Combined with what happened in Taigu Leidu not long ago, he immediately guessed that it was Ye Tian who won the Tianhai Jindan secret recipe, otherwise it would not be such a coincidence.

Ye Tian was able to kill the strong man of the 33rd Heaven in an instant, and his strength was far beyond his imagination.

If Ye Tian obtained the Tianhai Jindan,After the rapid increase in cultivation, I am afraid that he is almost invincible under the Ultimate Palace Master!

Such an existence, even the Yuan League dare not offend!

Although the Yuan League has an Ultimate Palace Master, he needs to guard the headquarters all the time and cannot come out easily. How dare he offend a strong man like Ye Tian!

"Can you collect it? Don't worry, I will pay for it!" Ye Tian said.

"Yes!"

How dare Ghost Old say no? If he uses the relationship of the Yuan League, he can indeed collect it.

Immediately, Ye Tian paid a part of the deposit and asked Ghost Old to collect it.

After a while, Ghost Old collected a part, but it was not so easy to gather all the resources.

After all, Ghost Old's status in the Yuan League was not so high, so it was naturally slow to collect. Fortunately, Ye Tian gave enough funds in time, otherwise he would not be able to collect it.

Another period of time passed, and Ghost Old finally gathered the materials for three Tianhai Jindan. .
